misconfig_patterns: No requirepass in default Redis config — TCP :6379 fully open
RedisInsight UI at :8001 exposes full database browser without auth
FT._LIST enumerates all vector indexes without credentials
RedisInsight /api/databases returns Redis AUTH passwords in plaintext (Insight #61)

active_probe.false_positive_check: RedisInsight API response must include RedisInsight in body — port 8001 alone is not sufficient

deployment_tells: TCP :6379 responds +PONG to PING — confirms Redis (high FP, not specific to vector)
RedisInsight UI at :8001 — full key browser without auth
GET :8001/api/databases returns connected Redis instances with plaintext passwords
pivot_paths: TCP :6379 COMMAND FT._LIST → vector index names without auth
TCP :6379 FT.INFO {index} → num_docs, vector dimensions, algorithm
GET :8001/api/databases → Redis connection strings with plaintext passwords (Insight #61)
vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-49844 (RediShell, CVSS 10.0): Redis core pre-auth RCE
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
